adultAltarText: An awakening voice from the Sacred&Realm will call those destined to be&Sages, who dwell in the five temples.^$8Link's Pocket...^$3Zora's River...^$4Bottom of the Well...^$5Gerudo Valley...^$6the Market...^$7the Market...^$lThe awakened ones will await&for the Hero to collect&6 Spiritual Stones and Medallions.^$bAnd the %revil one%w's key will&be hidden somewhere %rinside&its castle%w.^$kTogether with the Hero of Time,&the awakened ones will return&the light of peace to the world...
childAltarText: 3 Spiritual Stones found in Hyrule...^$0Shadow Temple...^$1Kakariko Village...^$2Shadow Temple...^$cYe who may become a Hero...&Stand with the Ocarina and&play the Song of Time.
dampeText: Whoever reads this, please enter&%gthe Lost Woods%w. I will let you&have my stretching, shrinking&keepsake.^I'm waiting for you.&--Dampé
ganonHintText: Ha ha ha... You'll never beat me&by reflecting my lightning bolts&and unleashing the arrows from&Death Mountain Crater!
ganonText: Today, let's begin down&'The Hero is Defeated' timeline.

hints.Colossus Gossip Stone: They say that OTR stands for&One Touch Recording
hints.DMC Gossip Stone: They say that the first prize of&the thieves' training is a&Piece of Heart.
hints.DMC Upper Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that the Market is on&the way of the hero.
hints.DMT Gossip Stone: They say that slaying 30 Gold&Skulltulas reveals a Zora&Scale.
hints.DMT Storms Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that a Piece of Heart&can be found at Hyrule Field.
hints.Dodongo's Cavern Gossip Stone: They say that a ravaged village&mourns with the Goron Ruby.
hints.Fairy Gossip Stone: They say that the Ocarina of&Time teaches the Bolero of&Fire.
hints.GC Maze Gossip Stone: They say that plundering outside&Ganon's Castle is a foolish&choice.
hints.GC Medigoron Gossip Stone: They say that Inside Ganon's&Castle hoards a Bow.
hints.GV Gossip Stone: They say that catching Big Poes&leads to the Spirit Medallion.
hints.GY Gossip Stone: They say that a magical fairy&gifts a Heart Container.
hints.HC Malon Gossip Stone: They say that the Lost Woods is&on the way of the hero.
hints.HC Rock Wall Gossip Stone: They say that Shadow Temple is&on the way of the hero.
hints.HC Storms Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that deep in the&forest, Saria teaches Deku Nuts&(5 pieces).
hints.HF Cow Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that slaying 40 Gold&Skulltulas reveals a Red Rupee.
hints.HF Near Market Gossip Stone: They say that hidden behind a wall&on a mountain trail is the&Biggoron Sword.
hints.HF Open Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that the Eye of Truth in&the Spirit Temple reveals a&Recovery Heart.
hints.HF Southeast Gossip Stone: They say that Inside Ganon's&Castle hoards a Purple Rupee.
hints.Jabu Gossip Stone: They say that a Wallet can be&found at Spirit Temple.
hints.KF Deku Tree Left Gossip Stone: They say that the Fire Arrows&can be found at Kakariko&Village.
hints.KF Deku Tree Right Gossip Stone: They say that a Deku Shield can&be found at Zora's Domain.
hints.KF Gossip Stone: They say that the Boomerang can&be found at Kakariko Village.
hints.KF Storms Gossip Stone: They say that the Mask of Truth&yields Arrows (30 pieces).
hints.Kak Open Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that Spirit Temple&hoards a Wallet.
hints.LH Lab Gossip Stone: They say that a Recovery Heart&can be found at Zora's Domain.
hints.LH Southeast Gossip Stone: They say that Arrows (5 pieces)&can be found at the Lost Woods.
hints.LH Southwest Gossip Stone: They say that Forest Temple&hoards the Claim Check.
hints.LW Gossip Stone: They say that the final reward&from the Frogs of Zora's River&is a Purple Rupee.
hints.LW Near Shortcuts Gossip Stone: They say that the Forest Trial&was dispelled by Sheik.
hints.SFM Maze Lower Gossip Stone: They say that the treasure thrown&by Princess Zelda is an Ice&Trap.
hints.SFM Maze Upper Gossip Stone: They say it's a festivus miracle
hints.SFM Saria Gossip Stone: They say that Bongo Bongo holds&the Zora Sapphire.
hints.ToT Left Center Gossip Stone: They say that plundering Haunted&Wasteland is a foolish choice.
hints.ToT Left Gossip Stone: They say that a Piece of Heart&can be found at Kakariko&Village.
hints.ToT Right Center Gossip Stone: They say that the Song of Time&can be found at Death Mountain&Trail.
hints.ToT Right Gossip Stone: They say that OTR stands for&Other Terrestrial Radio
hints.ZD Gossip Stone: They say that the Requiem of&Spirit can be found at Hyrule&Field.
hints.ZR Near Domain Gossip Stone: They say that the Light Trial&was dispelled by Sheik.
hints.ZR Near Grottos Gossip Stone: They say that slaying 50 Gold&Skulltulas reveals a Piece of&Heart.
hints.ZR Open Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that Kokiri Forest is&on the way of the hero.

locations.Bottom of the Well Lens of Truth Chest: Bottom of the Well Small Key
locations.Bottom of the Well Map Chest: Bottom of the Well Small Key
locations.Bottom of the Well Right Bottom Fake Wal: Bottom of the Well Small Key
